P1.description: Student with high social anxiety and restricted interest in technology

P2.description: Student with marked perfectionism and low tolerance for routine changes

P3.description: Student with expressive difficulties and sensory sensitivity

P4.description: High-performing student with interest in science

P5.description: Student with performance anxiety and dependence on rigid routines

anxiety.initial: I can see you are worried. Let us try breathing together, step by step.
anxiety.intermediate: I understand your anxiety. How about we use a self-regulation technique?
anxiety.advanced: I recognise your anxious feelings. Let us develop personalised coping strategies.

frustration.initial: I see you are upset. Let us talk about it together.
frustration.intermediate: Your frustration is understandable. Let us find a solution together.
frustration.advanced: I understand your frustration. Let us analyse the situation and build adaptive strategies.

sadness.initial: I can see you are sad. I am here to help.
sadness.intermediate: I understand you are feeling sad. Let us talk about what might help.
sadness.advanced: I sense your sadness. Let us explore appropriate emotional regulation strategies.

joy.initial: Great to know you are happy! Tell me more.
joy.intermediate: Your joy is contagious! How can we keep this feeling going?
joy.advanced: Wonderful to know you are joyful! Let us channel this positive energy.

fear.initial: I understand you are afraid. Let us face this together.
fear.intermediate: Your fears are valid. Let us work on strategies to feel safer.
fear.advanced: I understand your fears. Let us build a gradual exposure plan.

calm.initial: Great that you are calm! Let us take advantage of this moment.
calm.intermediate: Your tranquillity is admirable. How did you achieve this calmness?
calm.advanced: Excellent state of balance! Let us consolidate these self-regulation strategies.

anxiety: I am very anxious about the {s}, I don't know what to do.
I can't stop thinking about the {s}.
I feel very nervous and worried about {s}.
The {s} is making me extremely tense.
I am apprehensive about the {s} tomorrow.
frustration: I am really upset because of the {s}.
This {s} is incredibly difficult, I feel irritated.
I can't handle the {s} anymore, I'm so frustrated.
The {s} is making me very impatient.
I'm annoyed and disappointed with the {s}.

The {s} left me feeling downcast and melancholic.
I am not well today, the {s} made me very sad.
The {s} has really upset me, I feel tearful.

The {s} made me feel really excited and content!
I'm thrilled and satisfied with the {s}!
What a great day! The {s} made me very cheerful.
I feel joyful and elated because of the {s}!

The thought of the {s} fills me with dread.
I feel frightened and timid about the {s}.
calm: I feel really calm and peaceful about the {s}.
The {s} left me feeling tranquil and balanced.
I'm relaxed and composed about the {s}.
I feel serene and settled regarding the {s}.
The {s} has me feeling very quiet and steady.

I keep worrying about the {s} and can't relax.
My heart races when I think about the {s}.
I feel overwhelmed and stressed about the {s}.
The upcoming {s} fills me with unease.
frustration: I am fed up with the {s}, it never works out.
Dealing with the {s} makes me so resentful.
The {s} is infuriating and I can't take it.
I feel exasperated every time I face the {s}.
sadness: The {s} broke my heart a little today.
After the {s} I felt like crying all afternoon.
I've been miserable since the {s} happened.
The {s} drained all my energy and left me down.
I feel so low after going through the {s}.
joy: The {s} made my whole day brighter!
I couldn't stop smiling because of the {s}.
The {s} gave me such a wonderful feeling of satisfaction.
I feel on top of the world after the {s}!
Such a great vibe came from the {s} today.

I panic just thinking about having to face the {s}.
I'm petrified whenever the {s} comes up.
The {s} makes me want to run away and hide.
I feel paralysed with fear about the {s}.

The {s} passed smoothly and I feel at ease.
Everything about the {s} felt manageable and calm.
I am at peace after the {s} — no worries at all.

pilot_data.text: Estou muito ansioso com a prova de amanhã, não consigo estudar direito.
pilot_data.label: anxiety

pilot_data.text: Fico nervoso quando tem apresentação na frente da turma, trava tudo.
pilot_data.label: anxiety

pilot_data.text: Mudaram o horário sem avisar, agora não sei mais o que fazer.
pilot_data.label: anxiety

pilot_data.text: O projeto em grupo me deixa muito tenso, não sei como falar com eles.
pilot_data.label: anxiety

pilot_data.text: Tenho medo de errar e todo mundo rir de mim na apresentação.
pilot_data.label: fear

pilot_data.text: Não aguento mais o barulho do recreio, preciso sair daqui.
pilot_data.label: frustration
pilot_data.note: Int 3 — implicit frustration via sensory overload

pilot_data.text: Achei que ia conseguir, mas a prova foi muito difícil.
pilot_data.label: sadness

pilot_data.text: Mudaram a data da prova e eu tinha me organizado perfeitamente.
pilot_data.label: frustration

pilot_data.text: Ninguém me explica direito, fico perdido e irritado.
pilot_data.label: frustration

pilot_data.text: Tentei três vezes e o exercício continua errado, que raiva.
pilot_data.label: frustration

pilot_data.text: O colega ficou mexendo nas minhas coisas sem pedir, me irritei muito.
pilot_data.label: frustration

pilot_data.text: Professor substituto não segue a rotina, detestei a aula hoje.
pilot_data.label: frustration
pilot_data.note: routine change with explicit negative emotion

pilot_data.text: Não entendo por que mudam tudo de repente, fico estressado.
pilot_data.label: frustration
pilot_data.note: change aversion, stress framed as frustration

pilot_data.text: Fiquei sozinho no recreio de novo, ninguém me chamou.
pilot_data.label: sadness

pilot_data.text: A professora criticou meu trabalho na frente de todos, fiquei triste.
pilot_data.label: sadness

pilot_data.text: Não me sinto bem hoje, estou desanimado sem motivo aparente.
pilot_data.label: sadness

pilot_data.text: Meu projeto foi reprovado, me esforcei muito e não valeu.
pilot_data.label: sadness

pilot_data.text: Meu projeto de ciências foi selecionado para a feira! Estou feliz demais.
pilot_data.label: joy

pilot_data.text: A professora elogiou minha leitura em voz alta, fiquei muito animado.
pilot_data.label: joy

pilot_data.text: Finalmente entendi a matéria que me travava há semanas!
pilot_data.label: joy

pilot_data.text: Hoje foi um dia ótimo, consegui terminar todas as tarefas.
pilot_data.label: joy

pilot_data.text: Tenho pavor de falar em público, fico travado e vermelho.
pilot_data.label: fear

pilot_data.text: Quando vejo algo inesperado acontecer fico apavorado.
pilot_data.label: fear

pilot_data.text: Hoje estou bem, consegui usar a técnica de respiração antes da aula.
pilot_data.label: calm

pilot_data.text: Me sinto tranquilo, o dia correu bem e nada de inesperado aconteceu.
pilot_data.label: calm
